name: claude-design-importer
description: Import static design mockups into clean, tokenized Tailwind/shadcn components instead of copying magic pixel values.

plugins.name: claude-design-importer
plugins.description: Use when given a design to implement — an HTML mockup, a design file, or a screenshot — and asked to build, implement, recreate, port, or build out that design in a real codebase (React/Next.js + Tailwind, often shadcn/Radix). Triggers even when the user merely drops in an HTML/design file and says 'implement this' without mentioning tokens or quality. Converts pixel-exact inline styles and magic values into a proper token system — a rem-based modular type scale with tuned line-heights, semantic color tokens, and a spacing scale — instead of arbitrary values like text-[13.5px].
